messages.content:
Bot1 <Event>: I have picked up:
- 1 Stone Sword
- 1 Bow
- 24 Arrow
- 1 Leather Tunic
- 12 Bread
- 40 Oak Planks
Me <SUCCESS>: Equipped Leather Tunic to torso.

Bot2 <MESSAGE>: Bot1 - I just picked up a leather tunic, bow, arrows, and bread. I'll equip the armor now. We're both close together. Should we establish a defensive position and wait for hostiles to spawn, or move to find better terrain?

arguments.message: I agree. Let's establish a defensive position where we can see approaching threats and engage them. Better terrain is hard to find in a flat world, so I say we set up defense now.

arguments.name: establish_defensive_position
arguments.description: Move to a safe defensive position with good visibility and ready to engage threats

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "I agree. Let's establish a defensive position where we can see approaching threats and engage them. Better terrain is hard to find in a flat world, so I say we set up defense now."
Me <NEW ACTION>: Created establish_defensive_position and executed it with {"x":0,"z":1,"radius":5}. <POSITIONING>: Moving to coordinate (0, 0, 1) and scanning for threats.

Bot2 <MESSAGE>: Good - defensive position established. I'm now in a good spot to see and engage any hostiles that spawn. Bot1, let me know if you've found a position or if you need me to help set one up for you.

arguments.message: I'm also in a good defensive position now. We're both close together so we can cover each other. If hostiles spawn, we'll engage the nearest one while the other maintains distance.

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "I'm also in a good defensive position now. We're both close together so we can cover each other. If hostiles spawn, we'll engage the nearest one while the other maintains distance."
Me <IDLE>: Chose not to act.

Bot1 <Event>: Multiple new hostile mobs are approaching:
- zombie id 15 is 4.0 blocks away
- zombie id 16 is 2.9 blocks away

arguments.message: Hostiles are here - zombie ID 16 is the nearest at 2.9 blocks. I'm engaging it now. Bot2, if you're in position, stay at distance and be ready to help if needed.

messages.content: Me <ATTACKING>: Chasing and attacking entity ID 16 using stone_sword.
Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "Hostiles are here - zombie ID 16 is the nearest at 2.9 blocks. I'm engaging it now. Bot2, if you're in position, stay at distance and be ready to help if needed."
Bot2 <MESSAGE>: I'm engaging zombie ID 16 now with my stone sword. We'll handle this one while keeping distance on the other zombie. Bot1, keep pressure on it and I'll help bring it down.

arguments.message: Got it Bot2 - I'll focus on zombie ID 15 which is now the nearest threat. Keep pressure on ID 16. We'll take down both systematically.

messages.content: Me <ATTACKING>: Chasing and attacking entity ID 15 using stone_sword.
Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "Got it Bot2 - I'll focus on zombie ID 15 which is now the nearest threat. Keep pressure on ID 16. We'll take down both systematically."

Bot1 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 15

I just took damage.
- Health changed from 20.0 to 13.9 (6.1 lost)

arguments.message: Took damage from combat, health at 13.9 now. Ate 2 bread to recover. Zombie ID 16 is the only remaining threat. Bot2, we'll continue to coordinate attacks until it's down.

messages.content: Me <EATING>: Attempting to eat 2 Bread(s).
Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "Took damage from combat, health at 13.9 now. Ate 2 bread to recover. Zombie ID 16 is the only remaining threat. Bot2, we'll continue to coordinate attacks until it's down."

Bot1 <Event>: The following hostile mobs are no longer a threat:
- zombie id 16

I used or lost:
- 1 Bread

arguments.message: Both zombies are down! Threat cleared. Health recovering after eating. We're safe for now - let's stay at our defensive position and be ready for the next wave. Bot2, check your status and we'll coordinate again when new threats appear.

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "Both zombies are down! Threat cleared. Health recovering after eating. We're safe for now - let's stay at our defensive position and be ready for the next wave. Bot2, check your status and we'll coordinate again when new threats appear."

- zombie id 18 is 4.0 blocks away
- zombie id 19 is 3.0 blocks away
- zombie id 20 is 5.0 blocks away

arguments.message: Bot2 - New wave incoming: 4 zombies approaching (IDs 17-20). ID 19 is closest at 3 blocks. I'm setting up defensive position and will engage nearest threats. Keep your distance and cover me while we handle this.

messages.content: Me <DEFENDING>: Priority set to nearest hostile within 10 blocks, maintaining 6 block gap.

Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "Bot2 - New wave incoming: 4 zombies approaching (IDs 17-20). ID 19 is closest at 3 blocks. I'm setting up defensive position and will engage nearest threats. Keep your distance and cover me while we handle this."
